title: The Material Shadow of the Digital Economy: Tracing the Supply-Chain Footprint of ICT across 164 Economies, 1990–2029 — Replication Materials

creators.name: Gómez, Raimundo Elías
creators.affiliation: National Scientific and Technical Research Council (CONICET), Argentina; Institute of Sociology, University of Porto, Portugal

description: Replication materials (data, analysis scripts, and figures) for the article 'The Material Shadow of the Digital Economy: Tracing the Supply-Chain Footprint of ICT across 164 Economies, 1990–2029'. Includes Leontief inverse computation via Schur complement applied to the GLORIA MRIO database (164 economies, 120 sectors, 367 material indicators, 8 benchmark years), sensitivity analysis excluding sector 91 (Electrical equipment), and all publication figures.
